title: Patent Figure Sidecar
description: Per-figure metadata. Lives alongside each fig##_name.svg.js generator (or .svg/.png for hand-drawn). Source of truth for the locked reference numerals used in that figure and for the figure's caption text in the spec's Brief Description.

figureNumber.description: Integer figure number; matches the FIG-NN in the filename.

title.description: Short descriptive title shown above the figure on the rendered page (not in the spec text).

generationMethod.description: How the figure source is produced. 'svg-generated' = built by Node script under figures/. 'mermaid' is currently disallowed pending upstream htmlLabels:false fix; flag if used.

sourceDiagram.description: If derived from an internal engineering diagram, cite source (e.g., 'BOX-ARCHITECTURE-2026-03-26 §3.1').

caption.description: The full figure caption as it appears in the spec's Brief Description of the Drawings (e.g., 'FIG. 1 is a schematic block diagram...'). MUST match the spec text verbatim.

referenceNumerals.description: Locked numeral assignments used in this figure. Numerals MUST be drawn from the portfolio numerals registry; first use of a numeral in any figure or spec locks the assignment.

specParagraphIntroducingFigure.description: Paragraph number in spec where this figure is first introduced in Brief Description of the Drawings.

description.description: Brief prose description of what the figure shows, written for a future regeneration task.
